message:
test(lifecycle): pin canonical db filename + index/ parent in diag paths (ibuuh.19)

New lifecycle_matrix row diag_paths_use_canonical_filename_and_index_parent
extends the retention-safety coverage beyond nesting-only checks:

1. `db_path` must end in `agent_search.db` — backup/migration/retention
   recipes reference this name directly; a silent rename would break
   them even though the existing nest-check would still pass.
2. `index_path` must live under `<data_dir>/index/<generation>` so the
   retention policy's "sweep `<data_dir>/index/` for superseded
   generations" rule stays valid; also forbids the degenerate case
   where `index_path == <data_dir>/index` itself.

Additive to diag_artifact_paths_nest_inside_data_dir_for_safe_gc — that
row pins jurisdiction, this one pins layout shape inside the jurisdiction.

Test runs under isolated XDG_DATA_HOME + HOME tempdir so it's fully
hermetic. Verified: cargo test lifecycle_matrix passes (76 tests).

Refs coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
